elements.name: ntl-card-row
elements.description: Responsive row layout for ntl-card components.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Cards or sections rendered as cards.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Current responsive mode reflected by BreakPointMixin.

classes.name: highlight
classes.description: Raised card modifier for direct ntl-card children.

classes.name: with-borderless-cards
classes.description: Demo/theme modifier: removes border and inner padding from all direct ntl-card children via with-borderless-cards().

classes.name: with-item-separators
classes.description: Demo/theme modifier: adds separator pseudo-elements between direct ntl-card children via with-item-separators().

classes.name: footer-separators
classes.description: Adds desktop separators between direct ntl-card children.
